title: Fluoroscopy: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
ure you had. Several conditions and disorders can be diagnosed by fluoroscopy. Your provider may need to send your results to a specialist or do more tests to help make a diagnosis.
If you have questions about your results, talk to your provider. To understand the results of your fluoroscopy procedure, your provider may consider your symptoms, medical history, and the results of other tests.
Learn more about laboratory tests, reference ranges, and understanding results .
